title: Disable Zombie Sieges
description: Disable Zombie Sieges from spawning and messing up your village in all overworld biomes.
body:
Simple and lightweight datapack that disables zombie sieges for all overworld biomes. No more annoying zombie raids that mess up your village setup before you are able to put them all in a safe place. 

Currently only compatible with vanilla biomes, other biome mods on request.
